REQ-CONN-001.description: The GCS shall auto-discover connected UAVs broadcasting MAVLink heartbeats on specified UDP/TCP ports.

REQ-CONN-002.description: The GCS shall allow manual network setup (UDP port bindings, TCP hosts, baud rates) for telemetry links.

REQ-CONN-003.description: The GCS shall support graceful disconnection of active vehicles and clean release of socket resources.

REQ-MAV-001.description: The GCS shall implement the MAVLink protocol, validating heartbeat message reception at regular intervals.

REQ-MAV-002.description: The GCS shall reject corrupt or malformed MAVLink packets by validating message checksums (CRC).

REQ-MAV-003.description: The GCS shall handle packet sequencing, identifying packet loss and out-of-order delivery issues.

REQ-TEL-001.description: The GCS shall display live flight parameters including altitude, GPS coordinates, attitude (roll, pitch, yaw), battery voltage, and current flight mode.

REQ-TEL-002.description: The GCS HUD and dashboard Gauges shall render telemetry updates smoothly at a telemetry rate of at least 10Hz.

REQ-ARM-001.description: The GCS shall transmit arming commands to the autopilot, verifying the pre-arm check status and armed state confirmation.

REQ-ARM-002.description: The GCS shall transmit disarming commands, changing state from armed to disarmed with explicit visual feedback.

REQ-MODE-001.description: The GCS shall allow the user to switch between supported autopilot flight modes (e.g., Stabilize, AltHold, Loiter, Guided, RTL, Auto).

REQ-MODE-002.description: The GCS shall verify that flight mode transitions complete within 1000ms and are highlighted in the UI header.

REQ-MIS-PLAN-001.description: The GCS shall support drawing, adding, editing, reordering, and deleting waypoints on the mission planning interface.

REQ-MIS-PLAN-002.description: The GCS shall allow specifying command actions (e.g., waypoint, takeoff, land, loiter time, ROI) and target altitudes per item.

REQ-MIS-TX-001.description: The GCS shall execute a multi-step transaction upload handshake to transmit waypoint lists to the UAV, verifying write success.

REQ-MIS-TX-002.description: The GCS shall download the current mission active in the autopilot, updating the mission editor panel.

REQ-GEO-001.description: The GCS shall display configured circular or polygon geofences and support altitude boundaries.

REQ-GEO-002.description: The GCS shall generate warnings and display alert banners immediately (<1.0s) when a vehicle breaches geofence boundaries.

REQ-PARAM-001.description: The GCS shall load full parameter lists from the autopilot and provide search, filter, and categorisation options.

REQ-PARAM-002.description: The GCS shall write updated parameter values back to the autopilot, validating the write outcome and maintaining local caching.

REQ-MAP-001.description: The GCS shall render a responsive interactive map with coordinate grids, supporting offline tile caching and custom styling.

REQ-MAP-002.description: The GCS map shall trace the vehicle's historic flight path and project its heading in real time.

REQ-MVS-001.description: The GCS shall auto-discover, track, and isolate telemetry flows for up to 5 vehicles simultaneously on a shared connection port.

REQ-MVS-002.description: The GCS selector tabs shall switch focus, ensuring commands, parameters, and missions are directed only to the active vehicle.

REQ-LOG-001.description: The GCS main process shall log UI telemetry, IPC payloads, and critical exceptions to local logs.

REQ-LOG-002.description: The GCS shall download, store, and review vehicle binary dataflash logs (.bin) and telemetry logs (.tlog) for diagnostics.

REQ-ALT-001.description: The GCS shall pop up persistent visual overlays and play audio alerts on critical failsafes (e.g. Battery Critical, GPS Glitch, RC Fail).

REQ-ALT-002.description: The GCS shall host a scrollable console panel displaying full history of status text logs received from the vehicle.

REQ-REC-001.description: The GCS shall automatically attempt to reconnect telemetry streams upon link drop within a 2.0s threshold.

REQ-REC-002.description: The GCS state manager shall recover parameters and telemetry caches seamlessly across application reloads.

REQ-PERF-001.description: The GCS shall maintain a low footprint: CPU utilisation < 15% and RAM heap < 350MB under continuous telemetry stream.

REQ-PERF-002.description: The GCS UI thread shall remain responsive, avoiding frame-drops and keeping event handling latency under 100ms.

REQ-UI-001.description: The GCS shall provide responsive panels (Dashboard, Parameters, Calibration, Camera) loading in under 500ms.

REQ-UI-002.description: The GCS shall support clean UI scaling, fluid resizing, and a selectable high-contrast theme for outdoor field operations.

REQ-SET-001.description: The GCS shall persist user settings, window sizes, and local directories safely between application restarts.
